commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: Disciples. These were apparently disciples of St. John the Baptist, who believed in Christ from his testimony, and had received no farther instruction, nor any baptism but John's. (Calmet)

commentaries.author: Tertullian of Carthage
commentaries.content: Accordingly, in the Acts of the Apostles, we find that men who had "John's baptism "had not received the Holy Spirit, whom they knew not even by hearing.

methodology.step_1: Parse main page with BeautifulSoup for structure
methodology.step_3: Use Firecrawl to get full content from 'Go to Commentary' links
methodology.step_4: Fallback to BeautifulSoup for accordion content if needed
advantages: Records verses even without commentaries for complete tracking
